name: Scalable LLM Agent Tool Access in the Cloud
summary: arXiv:2607.15593v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: LLM agents increasingly rely on tool calling to act on external systems, and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) has quickly become its de facto inter...
description: arXiv:2607.15593v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: LLM agents increasingly rely on tool calling to act on external systems, and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) has quickly become its de facto interface. Operating MCP at cloud scale, however, becomes difficult. On the tool provider side, legacy services are not directly callable through MCP; the rapid protocol development also creates ongoing co...
author: Mingxin Li, Enge Song, Yueshang Zuo, Xiaodong Liu, Rong Wen, Qiang Fu, Gianni Antichi, Jian He, Jing Tie, Zhou Shao, Xiaobo Xue, Xiong Xiao, Luyao Zhong, Shaokai Zhang, Jiangu Zhao, Jianyuan Lu, Shize Zhang, Xiaoqing Sun, Changgang Zheng, Zihao Fan, Haonan Li, Tian Pan, Xiaomin Wu, Yang Song, Xing Li, Biao Lyu, Meng Li, Haipeng Dai, Guihai Chen, Shunmin Zhu
